requirement_topic.en: Site Fire-Safety and Emergency-Response Due Diligence
requirement_topic.zh: 场站消防安全与应急响应尽调
requirement_topic.zht: 場站消防安全與應急響應盡調

summary.en: Pakistan public sources do not support a blanket, single national lithium BESS fire-approval route for every project. Treat fire safety as project and local-authority due diligence: confirm the building, electrical, municipal, utility, insurer, EPC, owner, and local fire-service requirements for the actual site before shipment and commissioning.
summary.zh: 公开资料不足以支持巴基斯坦对所有锂电BESS项目存在统一的全国性消防批准路径。应将消防安全作为项目和地方主管机关尽调事项处理：在出货和调试前，确认实际场址适用的建筑、电气、市政、电网、保险、EPC、业主和当地消防要求。
summary.zht: 公開資料不足以支持巴基斯坦對所有鋰電BESS項目存在統一的全國性消防批准路徑。應將消防安全作為項目和地方主管機關盡調事項處理：在出貨和調試前，確認實際場址適用的建築、電氣、市政、電網、保險、EPC、業主和當地消防要求。

standards_or_laws: Site-specific building, electrical, municipal, fire-service, insurer, EPC, owner, and utility requirements where applicable
Project fire-safety specification and emergency-response plan

summary.en: China evidence under GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 36558-2023 can support hazard analysis, but it is not a Pakistan local-authority fire approval. Translate product evidence into site drawings, spacing, access, ventilation, detection, suppression, shutdown, signage, and emergency-response documents.
summary.zh: GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023项下的中国证据可支持危险分析，但不是巴基斯坦地方主管机关消防批准。应将产品证据转化为场址图纸、间距、通道、通风、探测、灭火、停机、标识和应急响应文件。
summary.zht: GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023項下的中國證據可支持危險分析，但不是巴基斯坦地方主管機關消防批准。應將產品證據轉化為場址圖紙、間距、通道、通風、探測、滅火、停機、標識和應急響應文件。

gap.en: Merged former fire-1, fire-3, fire-4, and fire-5: prepare one site package covering installation arrangement, thermal-runaway mitigation, emergency shutdown and isolation, fire-service interface, O&M limits, incident records, and damaged-battery handling.
gap.zh: 已合并原fire-1、fire-3、fire-4和fire-5：应准备一套场址资料包，覆盖安装布置、热失控缓解、紧急停机与隔离、消防接口、运行维护限值、事故记录和损坏电池处理。
gap.zht: 已合併原fire-1、fire-3、fire-4和fire-5：應準備一套場址資料包，覆蓋安裝佈置、熱失控緩解、緊急停機與隔離、消防介面、運行維護限值、事故記錄和損壞電池處理。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by the site authority, utility, insurer, EPC, owner, permit, or contract; otherwise project/local-authority due diligence rather than a confirmed blanket Pakistan BESS fire code
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on China project approval, construction/fire review, grid review, owner requirements, and the applicable GB standard scope

source.publisher: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA) — compulsory-item scope page used only as a scope-screening reference, not as proof of whole-site fire approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not present PEC or generic PSQCA pages as a lithium BESS site fire approval. Confirm project and local-authority fire-safety requirements for the actual Pakistan installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将PEC或PSQCA通用页面表述为锂电BESS场站消防批准。应针对巴基斯坦实际安装场址确认项目和地方主管机关消防安全要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將PEC或PSQCA通用頁面表述為鋰電BESS場站消防批准。應針對巴基斯坦實際安裝場址確認項目和地方主管機關消防安全要求。
